identity.title: WPLP-80 Workplace Pattern & Leadership Profile
identity.shortDescription: First full canonical contract v2 candidate package for WPLP-80, authored as the primary import/compile stress fixture.

authoring.author: OpenAI Codex
authoring.notes: Production-structured canonical candidate built from the full 80-item WPLP-80 source bank.

questions.text: When starting a new piece of work, I usually:
questions.helpText: Choose the option that feels most like your typical pattern at work, not your ideal response.

options.label: move quickly and refine as I go
talk through the approach with others before moving
make sure expectations are clear and people are aligned
review the detail before taking action

questions.text: My natural pace of work is usually:
questions.helpText: Choose the option that feels most like your typical pattern at work, not your ideal response.

questions.helpText: Choose the option that feels most like your typical pattern at work, not your ideal response.

options.label: speak with others to get alignment

questions.text: I am usually most comfortable with work that is:
questions.helpText: Choose the option that feels most like your typical pattern at work, not your ideal response.

options.label: move forward and adjust if needed

look for reassurance that the plan is workable

options.label: focused mainly on what most affects the outcome

rules.message: Your profile shows a strong Driver-style preference in one area and a strong anti-Driver preference in another. This can be context-driven, but it may also indicate impression management or role masking.
You selected the same response option across most items. This may reflect stable preferences, but can reduce interpretive confidence if done without item-level discrimination.

reportBindings.label: Executive Summary
reportBindings.explanation: A commercially credible, plain-English summary that explains how this person is likely to show up under pace, pressure, and stakeholder complexity.

reportBindings.label: Profile Balance Commentary
reportBindings.explanation: Interprets potential overuse/underuse dynamics in a relatable Insights-style voice without pathologising normal behavioural variation.

reportBindings.label: Interpretive Confidence Note
reportBindings.explanation: Flags response consistency tensions and advises cautious interpretation where confidence is likely to be lower.
